_publications._publicationTitle: Hydroxychloroquine prevents resistance to SHP2 inhibition in NF1-mutant cancers
_publications._context: Kinase enrichment proteomic analysis (MIB/MS) of NF1 MPNST patient-derived xenograft (PDX4) treated with SHP099, trametinib, hydroxychloroquine, and/or combination therapy (PRIDE PXD036000). PDX4 is derived from a human NF1-associated MPNST.

basicInfo.description: Patient-derived xenograft (PDX) established from a human NF1-associated malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor (MPNST). Referred to as 'PDX4' in the Parada lab (UTSW). Used to study response to SHP2 inhibition and combination therapy.
basicInfo.developerAffiliation: Parada Lab, UT Southwestern Medical Center
